name: Avani Vaidya
subject: Avani's QA coverage at CVS Health
body:
Hi Avani,

Managing QE at a health platform like CVS usually means your coverage backlog grows faster than your team can build new tests. Is the gap between what's covered and what's shipping something you're actively trying to close?

CRED was dealing with the same coverage gap and reached 90% regression coverage, 5x faster on Testsigma, without adding headcount. Their team stopped manually writing test cases for every new feature.

At CVS Health's scale, uncovered pharmacy and digital health workflows can hold up releases across every sprint. Is closing that coverage gap a priority for your team right now?

Rob
